title: Leave Me Dead Feat. Halos1, Phloeasy, and Knuckles
lyrics: I may be a crack baby, you may be listening to this for your little Jimmy sock rocking it Hating all this shit cause we got it and you don't got it But if you try to take me away you better understand one thing I'm telling you from the front of the game Watch out come, watch out rain Here we come, it's like this, yeah, ay So if you're leaving me, you better leave me If you're bleeding me, you better bleed me If your hurting me, you better hurt me Always, all days, anything you say, come So if you're leaving me, you better leave me If you're bleeding me, you better bleed me If you're hurting me, you better hurt me Always, all days, anything you say, come I'll find you I won't find you But we'll do, we'll find you I said it's real, I'll find you You better leave me today You wanna know what it's like to have a spot for limes Every gasp in fear, why the fuck is everybody wearing masks up in here Looking at you like looking in the mirror Look me in the eyes while you're acting so weird While you act like you can't hear anything that I've said with no regrets in my head I'm enveloped by the jealous with the gelatin spines I'm in a bind, won't abide by your rules or laws And all my peers look at me like it's a fraud I'm like hell, fucking all, I'm a hell reaping god In a spell, speaking not, I'm a melt off your jaw When you try to sing along, that's an incantation It's the end of Satan, there's no penmanship Of a mortal, I'm a demigod, bitch, you're a demigod So if you're leaving me, you better leave me If you're bleeding me, you better bleed me If you're hurting me, you better hurt me Always, all days, anything you say, come So if you're leaving me, you better leave me If you're bleeding me, you better bleed me If you're hurting me, you better hurt me Always, all days, anything you say, come I'll find you, I'll find you Or we'll, we'll find you Is that true? I'll find you, you better leave me I'm so pessimistic, still too fucking fresh Y'all just tool up the flesh, may forget but won't forget And I only forget cause I've been forgiving Still defiant to the point I never listen And any disposition gon' end up rips missing Riding with my riders, never fibbing Ayy, any disposition gon' end up rips missing Riding with my riders, never fibbing Gotta get money, gotta get paid Stupid ass niggas ain't tryna be me Say he Drake, so I gotta be played Mr. Willis, so he like a slave G.I.P. from the cradle to the grave I've been first place since first grade Marvin in these streets from New York, birthday Peace on the beat, so he told me, hey Drummer on deck, trappers on deck Niggas keep talking outside of my neck Can't teach you how to jerk, teach you how to paint Wine from a go-down with a son with a flex What's next? Kush Till these niggas miss me, I just lean tight Shots like Doug Liminski Bet I'm about to blow like a frag grenade Tipped on through these traps in place Tipped on through the trap in my days Niggas steady right here, lying in my face Fuck on my balls, I be lying in a grave Tryna get money, no time for the fakes Momma said kill him, so you know I'm gon' kill him I tight it on my anus, so you know I'm gon' drill him Licking out her booty, so you know I'm gon' feel him Swag like a vag' so you know I'm gon' kill her So if you're leaving me, yea You better leave me If you're bleeding me, yea You better believe me If you hurting me, yea You better hurt me Always, all days Anything you say, C*** So if you're leaving me, yea You better leave me If you're bleeding me, yea You better believe me If you're hurting me, yea You better hurt me Always, all days Anything you say, C*** Thanks for watching!
